'''mangozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seablite|seablite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ng-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seablite|seablite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mangozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mængezheth|mængezheth]] || [[word:mængezhej|mængezhej]] || [[word:mængezhesh|mængezhesh]] || [[word:mængezhe|mængezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mangongozhoth|mangongozhoth]] || [[word:mangongozhoj|mangongozhoj]] || [[word:mangongozhosh|mangongozhosh]] || [[word:mangongozho|mangongozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mangozhoth|mangozhoth]] || [[word:mangozhoj|mangozhoj]] || [[word:mangozhosh|mangozhosh]] || [[word:mangozho|mangozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mangofzhoth|mangofzhoth]] || [[word:mangofzhoj|mangofzhoj]] || [[word:mangofzhosh|mangofzhosh]] || [[word:mangofzhof|mangofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mangozhotho|mangozhotho]] || [[word:mangozhojo|mangozhojo]] || [[word:mangozhosho|mangozhosho]] || [[word:mangozhoko|mangozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mangozhoth|mangozhoth]] || [[word:mangozhoj|mangozhoj]] || [[word:mangozhosh|mangozhosh]] || [[word:mangozho|mangozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mangozhothol|mangozhothol]] || [[word:mangozhojol|mangozhojol]] || [[word:mangozhoshol|mangozhoshol]] || [[word:mangozhokol|mangozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mangozhothotho|mangozhothotho]] || [[word:mangozhojojo|mangozhojojo]] || [[word:mangozhoshosho|mangozhoshosho]] || [[word:mangozhoko|mangozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mangozhothon|mangozhothon]] || [[word:mangozhojon|mangozhojon]] || [[word:mangozhoshon|mangozhoshon]] || [[word:mangozhokon|mangozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mangozhothoro|mangozhothoro]] || [[word:mangozhojoro|mangozhojoro]] || [[word:mangozhoshoro|mangozhoshoro]] || [[word:mangozhokoro|mangozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
